description:
About the job

Role: Online (Remote)
Job Type: Part-Time Contract
Location: Remote (Work From Home)
Compensation: Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly




About the Role

We are looking for fluent language professionals to help train and evaluate AI language models. This is a flexible, part-time contract role you can do entirely from home, on your own schedule. If you work with language professionally - as a writer, teacher, translator, tutor, linguist, or language specialist - this role is a strong fit.




What You'll Do

Read and evaluate AI-generated text for quality, accuracy, and fluency
Write short prompts and creative responses to help train AI systems
Rank and compare AI outputs based on clear evaluation criteria
Provide written feedback on language quality




What We're Looking For

Fluency in your language and English
Bachelor's degree or higher, preferably in a humanities, language, or writing-related field
Professional experience working with language - writing, teaching, translating, editing, annotating, or related fields
Strong attention to detail and ability to follow evaluation guidelines
Background in linguistics, academic writing, data annotation, or AI content evaluation is a plus




What You Get

Up to $7.50 USD/hr, paid weekly
Fully remote - work from anywhere
Flexible hours - you set your own schedule
Part-time contract - ideal as a primary or supplemental income source




Equal Opportunity Employer:

We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.

description:
About the job

About The Company

DiDi Global Inc. is the world’s leading mobility technology platform. It offers a wide range of app-based services across markets including Asia-Pacific, Latin America and Africa, including ride hailing, taxi hailing, chauffeur, hitch and other forms of shared mobility as well as auto solutions, food delivery, intra-city freight, and financial services.

DiDi provides car owners, drivers, and delivery partners with flexible work and income opportunities. It is committed to collaborating with policymakers, the taxi industry, the automobile industry and the communities to solve the world’s transportation, environmental and employment challenges through the use of AI technology and localized smart transportation innovations. DiDi strives to create better life experiences and greater social value, by building a safe, inclusive and sustainable transportation and local services ecosystem for cities of the future.

For more information, please visit: www.didiglobal.com/news

About The Team/role

Being part of the Driver Growth Operations team will give you the unique opportunity to help drive growth in one of the fastest growing companies ever. This data driven role calls for a rare combination of user-centric, analytical thinking & interpersonal ability. You will have the opportunity to work in a tight team, where you will launch, build and run DiDi's business in Spanish Speaking LatAm. Be prepared for a hectic, fast paced and challenging environment. Never a dull moment!

Driver Growth Operations team members are very important for the expansion and sustainability of the business. The ideal candidates for our opening roles should have very strong analytical skills (e.g. Python, R, SQL, etc.) and feel comfortable transforming insights into business decisions.

You will be constantly seeking solutions that scale, while overseeing the growth of our business. Your processes and projects will directly contribute to DiDi growth in LATAM!

In this role, you'll be...


Support the execution of initiatives to bring back churned drivers, using data to identify opportunities and track results.
Help launch comeback incentives, communications and product initiatives for driver reactivation.
Constantly generate knowledge through experimental testing.
Manage data dashboards and analyze performance of driver strategies, to drive insights and business decisions.
Support the management of comeback incentives across Spanish Speaking LatAm, ensuring campaigns are launched correctly and on time.
Analyze campaign results and share learnings to improve future reactivation initiatives.



We're eager to be in touch because you have...


Currently studying Engineering, Computer science, Actuary, Economics or any related degree.
At least one year until graduation (ideally between 5th-8th Semester).
Strong Spreadsheets skills (Excel / Google Sheets) are a must. Comfortable about learning and using new software tools.
Passion for analytics and programming, with knowledge/experience in SQL (Nice to have: Python, R, Pandas, etc.).
Curious about innovation and automation, being able to leverage AI or other tools to enhance time efficiency and process automation for repetitive tasks.
Commitment and Integrity, being able to balance and manage time effectively between school and work, to ensure tasks are delivered on time.
Effective communicator. Proficiency in English & Spanish.



You'll love working at DiDi because...

We create user value

We strive to always create valuable experiences for our users in everything we do. Our focus is to always innovate new experiences that are safe, pleasant and efficient.

We are data-driven

We are strong believers in making informed decisions, that’s why we are data-driven. We can better navigate the business landscape strategically by analyzing valuable metrics.

Win-win Collaboration

Success is a team sport. When we work to help our partners and colleagues win, we win, too. While keeping everyone's best interest at heart, we communicate with candor and execute with excellence in all we do.

We believe in integrity

Integrity is at the very core of our business. We are people who always want to do the right thing. Our intentions are sincere, we speak our minds and listen to each other.

Growth

We always strive to do better. That means venturing beyond our comfort zones, learning from our mistakes, and helping each other grow.

Diversity and Inclusion

Diversity is one of our biggest strengths. Our differences are what make us distinct. We respect each other and believe in equal opportunities for all.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams

At DiDi, we believe that our differences are our biggest source of strength. That’s why we are committed to promoting equal opportunities to all candidates and employees as an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Employment and advancement decisions at DiDi are always made based on the needs of the position and the qualifications of the candidate. We do not discriminate against any employee or applicant based on their gender, age, sexual orientation, nationality, marital status, pregnancy/maternity, disability, race, religion and beliefs, or any other status protected by applicable laws wherever we operate.

We are committed to building inclusive and diverse teams, and a workplace that is free from discrimination and harassment, because that’s how we create better products and services, make better decisions and better serve the communities we’re a part of.

Communication: Professional fluency in both Spanish and English, with the ability to summarize raw trends into clear operational insights.

Develop email content aligned with campaign goals, brand voice, and audience needs.
Conduct A/B testing on subject lines, copy, CTAs, send times, and audience segments to improve performance.
Monitor and analyze campaign performance, including open rates, click-through rates, conversions, engagement, and other KPIs.

Translate campaign insights into actionable recommendations to improve future performance.

Experience with audience segmentation, email testing, and campaign optimization.
Ability to interpret performance data and turn insights into actionable recommendations.

Collaborative mindset with the ability to work cross-functionally and independently.

Familiarity with HTML/CSS for email formatting and minor template edits
Familiarity with SQL or AMPscript within Salesforce Marketing Cloud
Experience using analytics and reporting tools to measure content and campaign performance
description:
About the job

About Toptal

Toptal is a global network of top talent in business, design, and technology that enables companies to scale their teams, on-demand. With $200+ million in annual revenue and team members based around the globe, Toptal is the world’s largest fully remote workforce.

We take the best elements of virtual teams and combine them with a support structure that encourages innovation, social interaction, and fun. We see no borders, move at a fast pace, and are never afraid to break the mold.




Job Summary:

We’re looking for a results-driven Marketing Specialist to support and execute key marketing initiatives across email, content, SEO, and social media. This role is primarily focused on email marketing, automation, optimization, and analysis, and requires deep expertise in Marketing Automation (ideally in Salesforce Marketing Cloud). The ideal candidate will also be able to create high-quality written content for blogs, SEO, and social channels.




This is a remote position. We do not offer visa sponsorship or assistance. Resumes and communication must be submitted in English.




Responsibilities:




Email Marketing, Automation, Optimization, and Analysis

Own the execution of email marketing campaigns from planning through deployment, QA, testing, reporting, and optimization.
Build, manage, and optimize automated journeys, campaigns, and audience segmentation in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
Develop email content aligned with campaign goals, brand voice, and audience needs.
Conduct A/B testing on subject lines, copy, CTAs, send times, and audience segments to improve performance.
Monitor and analyze campaign performance, including open rates, click-through rates, conversions, engagement, and other KPIs.
Apply best practices across deliverability, compliance, personalization, and lifecycle marketing.
Translate campaign insights into actionable recommendations to improve future performance.




Blog and SEO Writing

Write and edit high-quality blog content aligned with brand messaging, audience interests, and SEO goals, while exercising discretion and independent judgment.
Create SEO-focused content and optimize written content for target keywords, search intent, readability, and internal linking.
Refresh and optimize existing blog content to improve rankings and performance.
Ensure all written content is clear, accurate, engaging, and on-brand.




Social Media Content

Create compelling social media copy and content concepts that support broader campaign and content objectives.
Support the content calendar with consistent, brand-aligned content across relevant channels.
Adapt campaign, blog, and email messaging into channel-appropriate social content.
Monitor content performance and recommend improvements based on engagement data and audience response.




Qualifications and Job Requirements:

About the job

About SPC Pro




SPC Pro helps manufacturing companies improve quality, visibility, and operational control through SPC software implementation, Gage Management solutions, and Ignition SCADA/MES/IIoT consulting and implementation services.

Our clients include manufacturing companies in automotive, medical devices, food & beverage, electronics, and industrial sectors. We work directly with Quality Managers, Production Engineers, Manufacturing Engineers, Controls Engineers, IT Managers, Plant Managers, and executive teams.

We are growing in Mexico and expanding into the United States and Europe. We are looking for a bilingual Service Delivery Manager who can help us scale delivery excellence and strengthen customer relationships.




Position Summary




The Service Delivery Manager will own the successful delivery of SPC Pro implementation and consulting projects. This person will act as the main communication bridge between clients, internal engineering teams, sales, product, and company leadership.

The ideal candidate has experience managing technical projects, coordinating engineers or consultants, communicating with manufacturing clients, managing risks and timelines, and identifying opportunities to expand client value.

This is a high-impact role for someone who enjoys technology, manufacturing, customer communication, and operational discipline.




Key Responsibilities




Service Delivery and Project Governance

Manage the delivery of software implementation, consulting, SPC, Gage Management, SCADA, MES, and IIoT projects. 
Create and maintain project plans, timelines, milestones, action items, risks, and escalation logs. 
Coordinate internal engineers, developers, QA, product, and support resources. 
Track delivery progress and proactively identify risks, delays, scope changes, and resource needs. 
Lead weekly project status meetings with clients and internal teams.

title: IT Developer
description:
About the job

About Zenit Corp:




Zenit Corp is a rapidly expanding ecommerce group that owns and operates multiple direct-to-consumer brands across various international markets.




Our focus is on building a portfolio of high-potential ecommerce brands with strong fundamentals, scalable systems, and long-term growth strategies. We are not focused on a single online store, but on developing a multi-brand ecommerce group capable of scaling across different verticals and markets.




The company is currently in a high-growth phase and is projected to reach eight-figure annual revenue this year. This creates a strong opportunity for early team members to take ownership, grow with the company, and become part of the team shaping its next stage of expansion.




We are looking for individuals who want more than just a job. We want builders, problem-solvers, and high-performance professionals who want to contribute to scaling a company with real ambition and momentum.




The IT Developer will be responsible for designing, building, improving, and maintaining the technology infrastructure that supports the company’s growth. This includes internal tools, ecommerce systems, automations, integrations, and scalable technical solutions that improve speed and efficiency across the business.




This role is ideal for someone who can execute quickly, solve problems independently, and leverage modern development tools, including AI-assisted coding tools such as Codex, to improve speed, quality, and productivity.




Role:

The IT Developer is responsible for building, maintaining, and improving software systems across the organization.




This is not just a coding role. The developer is expected to understand business challenges, translate them into technical solutions, move quickly, and deliver reliable systems that improve operational efficiency, performance, and scalability.




This person will collaborate closely with leadership, operations, product, and marketing teams to identify needs, design solutions, and continuously improve internal workflows and systems.




We are looking for someone proactive, structured, and execution-oriented. The ideal candidate can take a problem, understand the goal behind it, choose the right tools, and deliver a functional solution efficiently.




IT Developer Responsibilities:




❖ Software Development

➢ Build, test, and maintain web applications, internal platforms, and business tools.

➢ Develop scalable and reliable systems that support company growth.

➢ Identify, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues efficiently.

➢ Improve system performance, stability, and scalability.

➢ Build integrations between different tools, platforms, and internal systems.

➢ Maintain clean, secure, and well-structured codebases.




❖ AI-Assisted Development

➢ Use AI tools such as Codex and other modern assistants to accelerate development speed and quality.

➢ Work effectively with AI to generate, refine, test, and optimize code.

➢ Leverage AI for debugging, documentation, research, and implementation tasks.

➢ Stay updated on emerging AI tools and development workflows that improve productivity.

➢ Apply AI responsibly while maintaining strong engineering judgment, security, and code quality standards.




❖ Technical Collaboration

➢ Work closely with operations, product, marketing, and leadership teams.

➢ Translate business requirements into practical technical solutions.

➢ Participate in planning discussions and development alignment meetings.

➢ Communicate clearly on progress, blockers, timelines, and technical decisions.

➢ Ensure technical work is aligned with company priorities and business impact.




❖ Execution & Problem Solving

➢ Move quickly from problem identification to implementation.

➢ Focus on practical solutions rather than unnecessary complexity.

➢ Take full ownership of technical issues until they are resolved.

➢ Propose improvements to systems, workflows, and internal tools.

➢ Identify automation opportunities to reduce repetitive manual work.

➢ Deliver high-quality solutions within required timelines.




❖ Technology & Systems

➢ Build robust and scalable software systems.

➢ Improve company efficiency through automation and better tooling.

➢ Support ecommerce growth through strong technical execution.

➢ Reduce manual workload through integrations and system improvements.

➢ Enable faster execution using modern development practices and AI tools.

➢ Maintain high standards of performance, security, and code quality.




❖ Experience & Technical Skills

➢ Minimum of 2 years of software development experience.

➢ Strong knowledge of programming languages, frameworks, and web technologies.

➢ Experience using AI development tools such as Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, or similar.

➢ Ability to work independently and deliver functional solutions quickly.

➢ Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability.

➢ Interest in ecommerce, automation, and systems-driven business growth.




❖ Communication & Work Style

➢ B2 English level or higher.

➢ Ability to communicate in both English and Spanish.

➢ Strong independence and teamwork balance.

➢ Excellent organizational and communication skills.

➢ Clear communication regarding progress, blockers, timelines, and technical decisions.




Compensation & Growth

➢ Salary range: USD 24,000 – 30,000 annually, depending on experience and profile.

➢ Direct impact on a rapidly scaling ecommerce group.

➢ Long-term collaboration and growth opportunities.

➢ Exposure to modern tools, AI workflows, and scalable ecommerce systems.

➢ Opportunity to grow alongside a high-growth company.




Work Setup

➢ External monitor.

➢ Quiet and distraction-free workspace.




Ideal Candidate

➢ A proactive, fast-moving, and reliable developer.

➢ Someone who does not wait for perfect instructions to take action.

➢ A professional who asks the right questions, understands business objectives, uses available tools efficiently, and delivers solutions quickly.

➢ Well-suited for a demanding, fast-paced environment where technical work has direct business impact.

description:
About the job

¡Ayúdanos a impulsar el futuro de la tecnología en salud!

En Top Doctors Group trabajamos para mejorar la forma en la que las personas acceden a la atención médica. A través de la tecnología, conectamos pacientes, profesionales sanitarios y clínicas para ofrecer una experiencia más accesible, eficiente y humana.

Hoy estamos presentes en 10 países y desarrollamos soluciones digitales que ayudan a miles de profesionales sanitarios a potenciar su actividad y a millones de personas a encontrar la atención sanitaria que necesitan.

Creemos que la tecnología genera un mayor impacto cuando se pone al servicio de las personas. Por eso seguimos creciendo y buscando talento que quiera ayudarnos a construir el futuro de la salud digital en un entorno internacional, innovador y en constante evolución.

💡 ¿Por qué este rol es interesante?

Buscamos una persona que quiera convertirse en el nexo entre Marketing y Ventas, transformando la estrategia comercial en campañas, materiales e iniciativas que impulsen el crecimiento de una compañía tecnológica con presencia internacional.

Serás responsable de liderar la estrategia de Growth & Demand Generation para Latinoamérica, impulsando el crecimiento comercial desde México y adaptando iniciativas regionales a las necesidades de cada mercado. Trabajarás estrechamente con Marketing, Ventas y Producto para transformar objetivos comerciales en campañas, lanzamientos y acciones de alto impacto, contribuyendo directamente a la generación de negocio y al posicionamiento de la compañía en la región.

🚀 Lo que harás en tu día a día

📈 Impulsar iniciativas de crecimiento


Diseñar y ejecutar planes de Growth & Partner Marketing Manager orientados a la captación, activación y fidelización de clientes B2B.
Coordinar campañas multicanal y planes Go-To-Market junto con los equipos de Marketing y Producto.
Analizar el rendimiento de las acciones desarrolladas para identificar oportunidades de mejora y optimizar su impacto en el pipeline comercial.


🤝 Conectar Marketing y Ventas


Actuar como enlace entre los equipos de Marketing y Ventas para asegurar la alineación de prioridades, mensajes y objetivos.
Crear materiales de Sales Enablement como presentaciones comerciales, propuestas, casos de éxito, one-pagers y recursos de apoyo para el equipo comercial.
Colaborar con diferentes áreas del negocio para comunicar nuevas soluciones, lanzamientos y propuestas de valor.
Apoyar la preparación de propuestas y presentaciones para cuentas estratégicas.


🚀 Posicionamiento y activación


Coordinar eventos, webinars y acciones de engagement dirigidas a clientes y potenciales clientes.
Gestionar la relación con proveedores y colaboradores externos para garantizar una ejecución de alta calidad.
Analizar tendencias de mercado, competencia y oportunidades de crecimiento para adaptar las estrategias de marketing.


👀 Nos encantará conocerte si…

✔ Cuentas con entre 3 y 5 años de experiencia en Trade Marketing, Marketing B2B, Partner Marketing, Growth Marketing o Demand Generation.

✔ Has trabajado estrechamente con equipos comerciales impulsando objetivos de negocio.

✔ Tienes experiencia diseñando campañas, lanzamientos o estrategias Go-To-Market.

✔ Eres capaz de coordinar múltiples proyectos y gestionar diferentes stakeholders de forma simultánea.

✔ Conoces entornos tecnológicos, SaaS, plataformas digitales o empresas B2B de alto crecimiento.

✔ Tienes familiaridad con herramientas CRM como Salesforce, HubSpot, Microsoft Dynamics o similares.

✔ Cuentas con experiencia desarrollando materiales comerciales y presentaciones ejecutivas.

✔ Posees una mentalidad analítica para interpretar datos y tomar decisiones basadas en resultados.

✔ Destacas por tus habilidades de comunicación, organización y colaboración transversal.

✔ Cuentas con nivel profesional de español e inglés.

🎯 Cómo nos imaginamos a la persona que tendrá éxito en este rol

Más Allá De La Experiencia Técnica, Creemos Que Las Personas Que Mejor Encajan En Este Tipo De Posición Suelen Compartir Algunas Formas De Trabajar

✔ Piensan en términos de resultados e impacto comercial, entendiendo las necesidades del equipo de Ventas y orientando sus iniciativas a generar oportunidades reales de negocio.

✔ Se sienten cómodas colaborando con equipos multidisciplinares y son capaces de generar alineación entre diferentes áreas, incluso cuando no tienen autoridad directa sobre ellas.

✔ Comunican ideas de forma clara y estructurada, adaptando el mensaje a diferentes interlocutores y desarrollando materiales y presentaciones con enfoque ejecutivo.

✔ Utilizan datos, métricas e insights para priorizar acciones, identificar oportunidades y tomar decisiones informadas.

✔ Gestionan múltiples proyectos de forma simultánea, manteniendo la organización, el seguimiento y la capacidad de ejecución incluso en entornos dinámicos.

✔ Disfrutan combinando visión estratégica y ejecución, pasando con facilidad de la planificación a la puesta en marcha de iniciativas concretas.

✔ Mantienen una actitud proactiva, curiosa y orientada al aprendizaje continuo, adaptándose rápidamente a nuevos retos, tendencias y oportunidades dentro del ecosistema de salud digital.

💙 Qué encontrarás al unirte a Top Doctors Group


📈 Posibilidades reales de crecimiento y desarrollo profesional.
💻 Modalidad de trabajo presencial.
🕑 Jornada completa de lunes a viernes de 9:00h a 18:00h
🌎 Un entorno internacional, dinámico y colaborativo
👥 Líderes que priorizan el acompañamiento, la autonomía y el desarrollo de las personas
🥳 Un equipo con el que aprender, crecer y disfrutar del camino


🌱 Diversidad e inclusión

En Top Doctors Group creemos que la diversidad de experiencias, perspectivas y trayectorias nos ayuda a construir mejores equipos y mejores soluciones. Trabajamos para construir un entorno diverso, inclusivo y donde todas las personas tengan las mismas oportunidades para desarrollarse profesionalmente. Si necesitas cualquier adaptación o apoyo durante el proceso de selección, estaremos encantados de ayudarte.

🚀 ¿Te interesa?

Si has llegado hasta aquí y te identificas en buena parte con lo que buscamos, nos encantará conocerte. No creemos en las candidaturas perfectas ni en los perfiles que encajan al 100% sobre el papel, más allá de la experiencia concreta, valoramos aquellas competencias, habilidades y formas de trabajar que permiten aportar valor al equipo y contribuir al crecimiento de la compañía. Si crees que este reto puede encajar contigo, ¡aplica ahora!

Fundada en 2013, Top Doctors Group es un grupo de empresas tecnológicas líder en la digitalización del sector sanitario. A lo largo de nuestra trayectoria, hemos incorporado empresas especializadas y ampliado nuestro modelo hacia soluciones B2B, consolidándonos como un referente internacional en salud digital.

Nuestro propósito es claro: ayudar a cada persona a encontrar al mejor especialista cuando más lo necesita. Hoy, más de 1 millón de personas consultan nuestras plataformas cada mes y más de 10 millones de pacientes han confiado en nosotros en Europa, LATAM, Estados Unidos y Oriente Medio.

A través de nuestras marcas —Top Doctors, Top Health Tech, Ofimedic, iWantGreatCare, Manitex y Top Farma— impulsamos una atención médica más innovadora, eficiente y humana. Somos una compañía global en crecimiento continuo, con un propósito firme: transformar el futuro de la salud a través de la tecnología, el talento y la innovación.

description:
About the job

Our client is a fast-growing consumer brand in the personal care space with a strong e-commerce presence and retail distribution through major national retailers. The company primarily sells through its direct-to-consumer website, Amazon, and select retail partners, and is focused on improving website performance, conversion rate, and the overall digital customer experience as they continue scaling their online operations.




Location

Fully Remote | 9 AM - 5 PM EST




Role Overview

The E-commerce Specialist will own and optimize the company’s e-commerce website, with a strong focus on conversion rate optimization, landing page performance, and day-to-day site execution. This role works closely with the growth marketing team to ensure paid traffic, campaigns, product pages, landing pages, and onsite experiences are aligned and built to convert.

This is not a purely executional website maintenance role. The ideal candidate will bring both technical e-commerce expertise and strategic ownership, with the ability to identify opportunities for improvement, recommend better workflows and tools, and continuously drive website performance and customer experience improvements.




Key Responsibilities

Website Ownership & Ecommerce Management

Own the day-to-day management and optimization of the Shopify website.
Ensure product pages, collections, navigation, landing pages, and promotions are accurate, optimized, and aligned with business goals.
Manage ongoing site updates, campaign launches, product updates, merchandising changes, and website improvements.
Serve as the internal ecommerce expert responsible for maintaining an organized, high-performing, and conversion-focused website.




Conversion Rate Optimization

Lead ongoing CRO initiatives across the website, including product detail pages, landing pages, checkout flow, offers, upsells, subscriptions, and overall user experience.
Identify friction points within the customer journey and recommend actionable improvements.
Run, manage, and analyze A/B tests to improve conversion rate, average order value, and overall revenue performance.
Use customer behavior and analytics tools to evaluate user interactions and identify optimization opportunities.




Landing Pages & Growth Marketing Support

Build, optimize, and manage landing pages for paid media campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok, and other channels.
Partner closely with the growth marketing team to align landing pages with ad strategy, messaging, creative, and customer intent.
Support campaign-specific website initiatives including promotional pages, offer testing, seasonal campaigns, and acquisition funnels.
Improve the connection between paid traffic and onsite conversion performance.




Tech Stack Evaluation & Optimization

Audit the current ecommerce and website tech stack to identify useful, outdated, redundant, or missing tools.
Recommend and implement tools related to CRO, analytics, tracking, subscriptions, reviews, upsells, post-purchase experiences, and user behavior.
Work across platforms such as Shopify, Klaviyo, Microsoft Clarity, A/B testing tools, subscription platforms, review tools, upsell tools, and tracking platforms.
Stay current on emerging ecommerce and AI-enabled tools that improve execution speed, testing capabilities, and website performance.




Reporting & Performance Insights

Track and report on ecommerce KPIs including conversion rate, revenue, average order value, bounce rate, subscription metrics, landing page performance, and campaign conversion.
Translate performance data into clear recommendations for growth and leadership teams.
Create a consistent process for reviewing site performance and prioritizing optimization efforts.
Help identify which initiatives are driving results and where additional growth opportunities exist.




Qualifications

Experience

3–6+ years of ecommerce management experience, ideally within a direct-to-consumer consumer brand.
Strong Shopify experience is required.
Experience owning or heavily supporting conversion rate optimization initiatives.
Experience working closely with growth marketing teams and paid media landing pages.
Experience within health, beauty, personal care, CPG, wellness, or subscription-based ecommerce brands is a plus.

Skills

Strong understanding of ecommerce best practices, CRO, UX, merchandising, and funnel optimization.
Ability to balance both execution and strategic ownership independently.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to turn performance data into actionable recommendations.
Strong project management and cross-functional collaboration skills.
Comfortable evaluating tools, managing website updates, and communicating with developers or external vendors when needed.
AI-native mindset with curiosity around leveraging AI tools to improve testing, workflows, execution speed, and ecommerce performance.




What Success Looks Like

Clear ownership of the ecommerce website and day-to-day site performance.
Improved conversion rate through ongoing testing, optimization, and data-driven decision-making.
Stronger alignment between paid traffic, landing pages, and onsite customer experience.
A streamlined and effective ecommerce tech stack that supports scalable growth.
Faster execution of landing pages, campaigns, promotions, and website improvements.
Leadership and growth teams have a reliable ecommerce owner capable of making recommendations, executing initiatives, and driving measurable business results.




Opportunity

This is an exciting opportunity to join a growing consumer brand with strong direct-to-consumer traction and national retail presence. The E-commerce Manager will play a highly visible role with direct impact on revenue growth, website performance, and customer experience.

You’ll work closely with growth, creative, and leadership teams while taking ownership of a critical business function. For someone who enjoys optimizing digital storefronts, improving conversion performance, and driving measurable ecommerce growth, this role offers strong ownership, visibility, and long-term growth potential.

About the job

Description

At Gigamon, we are on a mission to protect the hybrid networks and data of some of the largest and most complex organizations around the globe. We're proud to be recognized as a Great Place to Work! Our innovative deep observability pipeline provides essential network intelligence to tools in the cloud, security, and observability space. This enables our customers to remove security blind spots, optimize network traffic, and significantly reduce costs and complexity in their tools, helping them effectively secure and manage their hybrid cloud infrastructure. With over 4,000 customers worldwide, including more than 80% of Fortune 100 companies, nine of the top ten mobile network providers, and numerous governments and educational organizations, we are making an impact.

About the Role: Senior Salesforce Analyst

We are excited to invite a passionate and self-motivated Senior SFDC Analyst to our dynamic Biz Apps team! You’ll join a small yet highly effective team that aims to achieve excellence in maintaining our core business applications and processes to support our corporate objectives and drive operational efficiency.

In this role, you will tackle exciting operational challenges and assist our internal teams in working smarter and more effectively. Initially, you’ll focus on supporting our Sales, Marketing, and Demand Generation teams by driving improvements in systems and processes, mainly within SFDC and its integrated applications like Traction Complete Marketing Systems and other marketing tools. By collaborating closely with subject matter experts (SMEs), you’ll pinpoint areas that need enhancement and transform those insights into actionable business requirements, gaining buy-in from stakeholders and overseeing the implementation process through solution development.

What You'll Do


Collaborate with SMEs to gain a comprehensive understanding of current business processes.

Gather and document system enhancement requests, and design, develop, and validate solutions.

What You Bring


5+ years of experience in a Sales or Marketing Operations role that works internally.

Familiarity with Traction Complete Marketing Systems is a plus. 
A strong ability to identify and address root causes of issues, implementing forward-thinking solutions based on thorough analysis. 
Proven experience collaborating with and influencing various stakeholders to make informed business decisions. 


Who You Are


Communicative and articulated, with strong written and verbal skills both in English and Spanish.

Excellent project management skills to keep everything on track.
